title: Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (General Data Protection Regulation) – Official Journal
quality_note: Primary law. Note: EUR-Lex pages were not machine-readable in this environment due to bot/JS gating; rules anchored to article/paragraph identifiers and should be verified against the official consolidated text by downstream tooling.

title: EDPB Guidelines 05/2020 on consent under Regulation 2016/679
quality_note: Interpretive guidance (EDPB). Used only to clarify meaning of GDPR consent conditions; does not override GDPR text.

title: EDPB Guidelines 4/2019 on Article 25 Data Protection by Design and by Default (Version 2.0)
WP29 Guidelines on transparency under Regulation 2016/679 (WP260 rev.01) – endorsed by EDPB
quality_note: WP29 guidance endorsed by EDPB; interpretive assistance for transparency obligations.

title: EDPB Guidelines 01/2022 on data subject rights – Right of access (Version 2)
quality_note: Interpretive guidance for handling access requests and scope/modality of Art 15.

title: EDPB Guidelines 07/2020 on the concepts of controller and processor in the GDPR (Version 2.1)
quality_note: Interpretive guidance clarifying controller/processor roles and allocation of obligations.

title: EDPB Guidelines 2/2019 on the processing of personal data under Article 6(1)(b) in the context of online services
quality_note: Interpretive guidance on necessity for contract basis in online services.

title: EDPB Guidelines 1/2024 on processing of personal data based on Article 6(1)(f) GDPR (Version for public consultation)
quality_note: Draft guidelines for public consultation; interpretive only and may change.

title: EDPB Guidelines 9/2022 on personal data breach notification under the GDPR (Version 2.0)
quality_note: Interpretive guidance on breach notification thresholds, timing, and content.

title: EDPB Guidelines 9/2022 – personal data breach notification examples (v1.0)
quality_note: Non-binding examples accompanying the EDPB breach notification guidelines.

title: EDPB Recommendations 01/2020 on measures that supplement transfer tools (Version 2.0)
quality_note: Interpretive recommendations post-Schrems II; includes 6-step roadmap and supplementary measures examples.

title: EDPB Recommendations 02/2020 on the European Essential Guarantees for surveillance measures
quality_note: Interpretive recommendations for assessing third-country surveillance interference with fundamental rights in transfer contexts.

title: EDPB Guidelines 02/2024 on Article 48 GDPR (Version 2.0)
quality_note: Interpretive guidance on foreign authority requests, interaction of Art 48 with Chapter V and Articles 5 and 6.
